narrative:
Wauseon Five (precinct in Fulton County) has 1,213 registered voters, with 57.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.6 percentage points.
